---
title: "ORCID Community Town Hall 2026"
date: 2026-03-25
author: "ORCID"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "Two live webinar sessions where ORCID shares 2025 progress and previews plans for 2026."
categories:
  - "Related Topic"
tags:
  - "ORCID"
  - "Community"
  - "Webinar"
proofread: false
image: "images/orcid-townhall-2026.png"
image-alt: "ORCID Community Town Hall 2026 event visual"
image-caption: "Event visual for the ORCID Community Town Hall 2026. Source: https://info.orcid.org/event/orcid-community-town-hall-2026/. Rights: ORCID."
toc: true
---

<!-- Source: <https://info.orcid.org/event/orcid-community-town-hall-2026/> -->

::: {.callout-note}
This event has already taken place. Any registration information has been disabled and is shown for reference only.
:::

## Details

- Date: Wednesday, 25 March 2026
- Location: Online (webinar)
- Session 1 (APAC): 01:00 UTC (02:00 CET)
- Session 2 (EMEA/Americas): 15:00 UTC (16:00 CET)
- Registration (APAC): ~~Registration closed~~
- Registration (EMEA/Americas): ~~Registration closed~~
- Event page: <https://info.orcid.org/event/orcid-community-town-hall-2026/>
- Replay: [Watch the recording](https://vimeo.com/1177327346)

## About

ORCID's senior team shares progress from 2025 and previews plans for 2026, followed by Q&A and discussion.
